originalTitle: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to "understand" your environment. The report comes just days after Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI that accused […]
content: OpenAI’s first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won’t have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to “understand” your environment. The report comes just days after Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI that accused the AI company of stealing hardware secrets. OpenAI, in a new statement on Tuesday, said that it is “not aware of any evidence that this complaint has merit.” Sources tell Bloomberg that OpenAI’s device will also feature a rechargeable battery that will allow users to carry it with them. It will offer smart home controls, along with the ability to play media, answer questions, and respond to messages. Bloomberg additionally says that the device will use GPT-Live, OpenAI’s upgraded voice model announced last week. Bloomberg reports that the device will use “mechanical elements that can move on their own” in order to “connect on a humanlike level with users.” In February, The Information reported on a similar device equipped with a camera that can recognize items or people nearby. The rumored speaker will launch in 2027 as part of OpenAI’s plans for a bigger hardware lineup, which currently includes “roughly” five devices, according to Bloomberg. OpenAI is collaborating with former Apple designer Jony Ive on the new devices following its nearly $6.5 billion acquisition of his design company, io Products. OpenAI didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment. The company has also been teasing a Codex gadget called the Codex Micro, made in partnership with Work Louder, that’s scheduled to release on July 15th.
chineseTitle: OpenAI 今年可能会推出 ChatGPT 智能音箱
chineseSummary: 据彭博社报道，OpenAI 的第一款设备将是一款智能扬声器，可以让你与 ChatGPT 交谈。该设备显然没有屏幕，但将使用摄像头和附加传感器来“了解”您的环境。该报告发布几天前，苹果公司对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，指控 [...]
chineseContent: 据彭博社报道，OpenAI 的第一款设备将是一款智能扬声器，可以让你与 ChatGPT 交谈。该设备显然没有屏幕，但会使用摄像头和附加传感器来“了解”您的环境。该报告发布前几天，苹果公司对 OpenAI 提起诉讼，指控这家人工智能公司窃取硬件机密。 OpenAI 在周二的一份新声明中表示，“不知道有任何证据表明这一投诉有根据”。消息人士告诉彭博社，OpenAI 的设备还将配备可充电电池，允许用户随身携带。它将提供智能家居控制，以及播放媒体、回答问题和回复消息的功能。彭博社还表示，该设备将使用 OpenAI 上周宣布的升级版语音模型 GPT-Live。彭博社报道称，该设备将使用“可以自行移动的机械元件”，以便“与用户建立类似人类的联系”。二月份，The Information 报道了一款类似的设备，配备了摄像头，可以识别附近的物品或人。据彭博社报道，传闻中的扬声器将于 2027 年推出，作为 OpenAI 更大硬件阵容计划的一部分，目前该阵容包括“大约”五种设备。 OpenAI 以近 65 亿美元收购前苹果设计师 Jony Ive 的设计公司 io Products 后，正在与他合作开发新设备。 OpenAI 没有立即回应置评请求。该公司还一直在宣传一款名为 Codex Micro 的 Codex 小工具，该小工具是与 Work Louder 合作开发的，计划于 7 月 15 日发布。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
